score.description: 0-100. How strongly the idea-with-this-team survives scrutiny: high = survives as-is or the team clearly pivots through; low = fails scrutiny with a team unlikely to adapt. Must agree directionally with `verdict`.

verdict.description: Does the idea survive scrutiny as-is, or is the team strong enough to pivot? Deliberately entangles idea quality with team adaptability — that is the dimension.

position_refs.description: Seat references into the room. Required (>=1) when the room convened; must be empty when it did not.

room_effect.description: How the room moved this dimension. Empty string in degraded no-room mode.

mandate_refs.description: Thesis field names that shaped this rating.
